/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libMPIDPluginCUDA.so -o libMPIDPluginCUDA.so CMakeFiles/MPIDPluginCUDA.dir/src/MPIDCudaKernelFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MPIDPluginCUDA.dir/src/MPIDCudaKernels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MPIDPluginCUDA.dir/src/CudaMPIDKernelSources.cpp.o   -L/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib  -L/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib/plugins  -Wl,-rpath,/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/Documents/project/PhyNEO/phyneo_openmm/MPIDOpenMMPlugin/build-openmm840-linux-cuda:/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib:/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib/plugins: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lOpenMM -lOpenMMCUDA ../../libMPIDPlugin.so -lOpenMM
